signals: Growing internal demand for AI workloads
Teams asking for GPU, vector, and model-serving infrastructure
Operational complexity increasing faster than headcount

workflow_change.before: Mostly managed CI/CD, cloud infra, observability, and deployment reliability for standard application services.
workflow_change.after: Now also supports AI-related infra requests, cost concerns, data pipelines, and experimentation environments.

actions: Learned more about model serving and GPU infrastructure
Expanded observability practices for AI systems
Documented infra patterns for AI workloads

outcome.early_effect: Role feels more strategically important, though workload has increased.

narrative.summary: AI has increased pressure, but mostly by expanding the surface area of infra work rather than shrinking it.
